title: [v5.4-rhel] cirrus: remove functional tests
body:
As discussed at the cabal October 8, 2024 we have no need for these
tests on RHEL branches.

See commit https://github.com/containers/podman/commit/0ed2c91b6e5079d8f567ce7c6afff8c827dd50b3 for more details.

```release-note
None
```
